name: cream vinaigrette
instructions: whisk white wine vinegar (or lemon juice — either works), heavy whipping cream, and raw minced garlic together.
notes:
Garlic stays raw.

ACID CHOICE: white wine vinegar or lemon juice — either is fine. Lemon juice gives a brighter, slightly sweeter dressing; white wine vinegar gives a sharper, more traditionally french-vinaigrette read. The two are roughly substitutable here.
